title: St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil
tagline: St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Antony's Forane Church is a Syro-Malabar Catholic church and the first church in India named after St. Antony. It was founded in 883 AD. This church is one of the famous pilgrimage centers in Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pazhuvil
topPlaces.description: Pazhuvil is a small village in Trissur district of Kerala state, south India. It is 17 km from Thrissur town, on the Cherpu - Triprayar road.

topPlaces.name: Kurumpilavu
topPlaces.description: Kurumpilavu is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Major area of Kurumpilavu is covered with paddy and coconut fields.

topPlaces.name: Chirakkal, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Chirakkal is a small village in Thrissur district of Kerala, South India. It is fifteen kilometers from Thrissur city, on the Cherpu-Thriprayar road.

topPlaces.name: Karanchira
topPlaces.description: Karanchira is a small village in Thrissur district of Kerala, South India. This hamlet is surrounded by a river(Karivannur River) and green fields, and is a part of the Mukundapuram parliament constituency.

topPlaces.name: Inchamudi
topPlaces.description: Inchamudi is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kizhuppillikkara
topPlaces.description: Kizhuppillikkara is a village in Thaniyam Panchayath in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Two-thirds of the village is surrounded by the Karuvannur river.

topPlaces.name: Thanniyam
topPlaces.description: Thanniyam is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kanadikavu Shree Vishnumaya Kuttichathan Swamy temple
topPlaces.description: The Kanadikavu Shree Vishnmaya Kuttichathan Swamy temple is the oldest Vishnumaya temple located 20 km southwest of Thrissur, Peringottukara, in Kerala, India. The main deity of the temple is shree Vishnumaya and 390 Kuttichathans.

image.alt: Kanadikavu Shree Vishnumaya Kuttichathan Swamy temple

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (52 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil?
faq.a: Stays in St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Antony's Church, Pazhuvil?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pazhuvil, Kurumpilavu, Chirakkal, Thrissur, Karanchira, Inchamudi.
